sample_level: Add Health full baseline school range
definition: Students from grades 7 to 12 at Wave I
project_role: Description of the Add Health baseline design
notes: This range is broader than the thesis population.

definition: Students from grades 10 to 12 at Wave I
notes: This is the closest school-grade equivalent to the original thesis design.

definition: Students aged 15 to 19 at Wave I
project_role: Age-based validation of comparability with the thesis
notes: Age is important, but grade is the main alignment criterion because the thesis was based on school years.

definition: Students from grades 10 to 12 and aged 15 to 19 at Wave I
notes: This may reduce sample size, but improves comparability.

definition: All Wave I public-use respondents with valid data for the selected outcome and covariates
inclusion_in_main_analysis: No, used only for robustness comparison
notes: Useful to check whether results depend strongly on grade restriction.
